arts.ttl: Unai Emery told me about Aston Villa's Wembley dream and 'how much' FA Cup means
arts.sum: “Of course, I know how much it means for the supporters to be there,” Emery said of playing at Wembley. Every time Unai Emery and his Aston Villa players arrive at Bodymoor Heath, they’re reminded of the many major honours the club has won in its decorated history.

arts.ttl: ‘I spoke to Aston Villa’: Striker who scored 91 Premier League goals says he almost signed for Aston Villa
arts.sum: Aston Villa have had a few interesting transfer near misses over the years. Emmanuel Adebayor nearly signed for Villa at one point, while Charlie Adam...

arts.ttl: If I knew Aston Villa were going big in the transfer window, I'd give it another year
arts.sum: Downing, who acknowledged Jhon Duran's sale to Saudi side Al-Nassr in January, has been impressed by the squad that Emery and Monchi have assembled and thinks that, even if they come up short in their bid to return to the Champions League next term, no player should be in a rush to bid farewell. Former Aston Villa winger Stewart Downing doesn't believe anybody currently in the squad should be in a rush to leave the club this summer even if they fail to secure a second straight year in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Osimhen, Sesko, Ekitike - Aston Villa transfer round up ahead of summer window - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Dutch great Wesley Sneijder said of Ekitike earlier this season: “I might say something really crazy, but I’ll say it anyway: I think he’s a mix between Neymar and Kylian Mbappe. Aston Villa have been linked with a move to bring Victor Osimhen to the Premier League in the summer transfer window, after it was reported that he has no interest in switching to the Saudi Pro League and would rather test himself in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa and Newcastle pushed aside as Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester United eye up big summer transfer
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Newcastle United have ‘little chance’ of signing Eintracht Frankfurt star Hugo Ekitike this summer as Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester United eye up moves. That’s according to Sky Germany, who report that the German side are expecting their striker to depart in the summer transfer window. They explain that Ekitike is 99% likely The post Aston Villa and Newcastle pushed aside as Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester United eye up big summer transfer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Team News: Preston North End vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's FA Cup clash between Preston North End and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: FA Cup semi-final draw, Aston Villa ball number and start time confirmed
arts.sum: On Saturday, Fulham take on Crystal Palace before, in the evening, Brighton host Nottingham Forest for places in the semi-finals, too. Aston Villa take on Preston North End for a place in the FA Cup semi-final, and a day out at Wembley, on Sunday

arts.ttl: Aston Villa academy star ends 406-day injury hell after £12m transfer
arts.sum: Aston Villa sold Aaron Ramsey to Burnley in the summer of 2023 but the midfielder has had poor luck with injuries After fruitful spells on loan with Championship outfits Norwich City and Middlesbrough - particularly in the latter where he helped to inspire a play-off push under Michael Carrick - Ramsey left Villa for good in the summer of 2023 when he joined newly promoted Burnley.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Want to Sign ‘Unbelievable’ Aston Villa Star Alongside Dibling
arts.sum: Tottenham are in the race for Aston Villa ace Leon Bailey who has fallen out of favour under Unai Emery.

arts.ttl: Brighton suffer injury setback ahead of Aston Villa while defender remains a doubt
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion manager Fabian Hurzeler has confirmed that defender Tariq Lamptey is in a race against time to return to action before the end of the Premier League season after he picked up an ankle injury in training before the international break - and so he has been ruled out of Wednesday night's meeting with Aston Villa. Aston Villa play Brighton and Hove Albion in the Premier League on Wednesday night and the Seagulls have some injury issues
